methods.name: scripts.revision_retriever.Retriever.retrieve_revisions
documentation:
Retrieve revisions from Phabricator.

Args:
    limit_months: The number of months to go back in time to retrieve
        revisions. The limit is based on bugs last activity date and
        commits push date.
    limit_count: Only download the N oldest revisions, used mainly for
        integration tests.

modules.name: scripts.code_review_tool_evaluator
documentation:
This script evaluates different variants of the code review tool.

Before running this script, you may need to set the following environment
variables:
    - BUGBUG_PHABRICATOR_URL
    - BUGBUG_PHABRICATOR_TOKEN
    - BUGBUG_*_API_KEY (replace * with your LLM provider)
    - BUGBUG_QDRANT_API_KEY
    - BUGBUG_QDRANT_LOCATION

To specify different variants to evaluate, please modify the get_tool_variants
function.
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-
This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this file,
You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/.

functions.name: scripts.code_review_tool_evaluator.get_tool_variants
documentation:
Returns a list of tool variants to evaluate.

Returns:
    List of tuples, where each tuple contains the name of the variant and
    and instance of the code review tool to evaluate.

methods.name: bugbug.rust_code_analysis_server.RustCodeAnalysisServer.metrics
documentation:
Get code metrics for a file.

Args:
    filename: the path for the file that we want to analyze
    code: the content of the file
    unit: when unit is True, then only metrics for top-level is
        returned, when False, then we get detailed metrics for all
        classes, functions, nested functions, ...

functions.name: bugbug.model.get_transformer_pipeline
documentation:
Create a pipeline that contains only the transformers.

This will exclude any steps that do not have a transform method, such as a
sampler or estimator.

Args:
    pipeline: the pipeline to extract the transformers from.

Returns:
    a pipeline that contains only the transformers.

functions.name: bugbug.model.classification_report_imbalanced_values
documentation:
Build a classification report based on metrics used with imbalanced dataset.

Copy of imblearn.metrics.classification_report_imbalanced to have
access to the raw values. The code is mostly the same except the
formatting code and generation of the report which haven removed. Copied
from version 0.4.3. The original code is living here:
https://github.com/scikit-learn-contrib/imbalanced-learn/blob/b861b3a8e3414c52f40a953f2e0feca5b32e7460/imblearn/metrics/_classification.py#L790

methods.name: bugbug.model.Model.evaluation
documentation: Subclasses can implement their own additional evaluation.

methods.name: bugbug.model.Model.get_labels
documentation: Subclasses implement their own function to gather labels.

methods.name: bugbug.model.Model.check
documentation:
Ensure everything is OK.

Subclasses can implement their own check, the base model doesn't check
anything at the moment.

methods.name: bugbug.model.Model.get_extra_data
documentation:
Get extra data for the model.

Returns:
    a dict that can be used for customers who need static extra data for
    a given model. Must return a dict with JSON-encodable types.

functions.name: bugbug.tools.code_review.gather_line_context
documentation:
Reformat the line context list and remove duplicates.

Args:
    line_context: List of lists, where each list is [line, file, function].

Returns:
    List of tuples, where each tuple is (gathered_line, file, function). The
    'gathered_line' is a str that concatenates the 'line' with a separator
    (i.e., `\n`) that required the same function.

classes.name: bugbug.tools.code_review.ModelResultError
documentation: Occurs when the model returns an unexpected result.

classes.name: bugbug.tools.code_review.FileNotInPatchError
documentation: Occurs when the file in the model result is not part of the patch.

classes.name: bugbug.tools.code_review.HunkNotInPatchError
documentation: Occurs when the hunk in the model result is not part of the patch.

classes.name: bugbug.tools.code_review.LargeDiffError
documentation: Occurs when the diff is too large to be processed.

methods.name: bugbug.tools.code_review.ReviewData.load_raw_diff_by_id
documentation:
Load a patch from local cache if it exists.

If the patch is not in the local cache it will be requested from the
provider and cache it locally.

Args:
    diff_id: The ID of the patch.

Returns:
    The patch.

functions.name: bugbug.bugzilla.fetch_components_list
documentation:
Fetch all components from all products.

Args:
    product_types: The types of products to fetch components from. Defaults
        to "accessible".

Returns:
    A list of tuples where the first element is the product name and the
    second element is the component name.

functions.name: bugbug.bugzilla.get_product_component_count
documentation:
Get the number of bugs per component.

Returns:
    a dictionary where keys are full components (in the form of
    `{product}::{component}`) and the value of the number of bugs for the
    given full components. Full component with 0 bugs are returned.

classes.name: bugbug.bug_features.BugTypes

methods.name: bugbug.bug_features.BugTypes.__call__
documentation:
Infer bug types based on various bug characteristics.

Args:
- bug (bugzilla.BugDict): A dictionary containing bug data.
- bug_map (Optional[dict[int, bugzilla.BugDict]]): A mapping
    of bug IDs to bug dictionaries. Default is None.

Returns:
- list[str]: A list of inferred bug types (e.g., "memory", "power",
    "performance", "security", "crash").
Determine bug type.

classes.name: bugbug.bug_features.BugType
documentation: Extracts the type of the bug.
